nasb.text: Then Seth lived eight hundred and seven years after he became the father of Enosh, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: Seth lived after he fathered Enosh 807 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 塞特生以挪士以後，還活了八百零七年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了八百零七年，生儿育女，

csbs.text: 塞特生了以挪士之后，又活了八百零七年，并且生了其他的儿女。
